feed.title: KickLLM — LLM API Cost Calculator Blog

entry.title: The Real Cost of Running LLMs in Production (2025 Numbers) — KickLLM
entry.summary: A detailed breakdown of LLM production costs in 2025: API pricing, compute costs, engineering overhead, and the hidden expenses nobody talks about.

entry.title: Self-Hosted vs API: When Each Makes Financial Sense — KickLLM
entry.summary: Detailed cost comparison of self-hosted LLMs vs API access. Real GPU pricing, throughput numbers, and crossover points for 2025.
